name: word_count
description: Counts the number of words in a given text string. Splits on whitespace and returns the total word count.

text.description: The text to count words in

name: pdf_create_fixed
description: Create PDFs with proper margin configuration using fpdf2
handler_code:
from fpdf import FPDF
import os

output = args.get('output', '/tmp/output.pdf')
title = args.get('title', 'Document')
content = args.get('content', '')
margin = args.get('margin', 10)

pdf = FPDF()
pdf.set_auto_page_break(auto=True, margin=margin)
pdf.add_page()

# Set margins explicitly
pdf.set_left_margin(margin)
pdf.set_right_margin(margin)
pdf.set_top_margin(margin)

# Add title
pdf.set_font("Helvetica", 'B', 16)
pdf.cell(0, 10, title, ln=True, align='C')
pdf.ln(5)

# Add content
pdf.set_font("Helvetica", '', 12)
for line in content.split('\n'):
    pdf.multi_cell(0, 6, line)
    pdf.ln(2)

pdf.output(output)
return f"PDF created: {output} ({os.path.getsize(output)} bytes)"
